category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides persistent ssh tunnels with embedded ssh server; official README says Rospo creates secure and reliable SSH tunnels.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is Rospo; source_facts.name is rospo.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best official documentation surface found and contains features, installation, quick CLI usage, and example scenarios.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo enrichment was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README list persistent SSH tunnels, embedded SSH server, SFTP, SOCKS proxy, DNS over SSH, and CLI/config usage.
